title: The Bhootnii
subTitle: After a heartbreak, Shantanu unknowingly summons a spirit named Mohabbat, whose obsessive presence begins to disrupt the peace of the entire college campus.

title: Salaami
subTitle: After Vijay, a young army cadet, finds evidence against the corrupt officer, Gautam, he gets entangled in a never-ending battle with the police, which puts his career and his family in trouble.

title: Gaddaar
subTitle: A wealthy businessman's son manipulates a loyal friend into his personal schemes, but unexpected love and rising tensions threaten to unravel their lives.

title: Trimurti
subTitle: A wrongfully convicted policewoman expects her three children to settle scores with her enemy. But when the long-awaited moment arrives, luck does not seem to be on her side.

title: Khatron Ke Khiladi
subTitle: Balwant, a truck driver, is driven into the underworld as he wants to take revenge on the owners of the trucking company for the death of his brother.

title: Kasam Suhaag Ki
subTitle: Troubles arise for Surajmukhi after her husband, Sultan, is gunned down and she and her daughter get abducted by goons. She tries her best to get revenge and escape with her child.

title: Bol Radha Bol
subTitle: While Kishen enjoys village life and romance with Radha, a sinister doppelganger plots. Upon returning home, he'll discover his identity and life stolen by this malevolent impostor.

title: Mard Ki Zabaan
subTitle: The lives of brothers Ram and Lakshman are irrevocably changed when Ram marries Raghupati's daughter, triggering a series of events that lead to loss and lamentation.

title: Prem Rog
subTitle: After a series of tragedies shake Manorama's life, Devdhar, her childhood friend who falls for her, vows to make her happy. In the process, he faces the wrath of Manorama's conservative family.

title: Insan
subTitle: Ajit Rathod, a grieving policeman, vows to catch his wife's killer, terrorist Azhar Khan. He pursues Azhar with single-minded focus, overcoming all hurdles.

title: Insan
subTitle: Ajit Rathod, a grieving policeman, vows to catch his wife's killer, terrorist Azhar Khan. He pursues Azhar with single-minded focus, overcoming all hurdles.

title: Maseeha
subTitle: Krishna, a victim of the local gangster Surajbhan's atrocities, joins forces with Shiva, whose parents were killed upon Surajbhan's orders, and resolves to bring him down.

title: Ghajini
subTitle: Suffering from memory loss every 15 minutes, a heartbroken man uses photographs, notes and tattoos to keep reminding himself to punish his lady-love's murderer.

title: Maharaja
subTitle: Prince Kohinoor returns home after twenty years only to discover that Ranbir Singh, his parents' killer, still holds control. Subsequently, he decides to defeat him to protect his loved ones.

title: Radha Ka Sangam
subTitle: Radha and Govinda are in love with each other and get married. Post the wedding, their life goes awry when Govinda is arrested, leaving Radha to tackle problems all alone.

title: Maine Pyar Kiya
subTitle: Prem and Suman fall in love with each other, only to be torn apart by family differences. However, Suman's father is willing to give Prem one last chance where he must prove himself worthy of Suman.

title: Khatta Meetha
subTitle: A seemingly corrupt petty contractor faces challenges from the local municipality, his family, his employees, as well as a former girlfriend and her family.

title: Aitraaz
subTitle: When a company chairman's trophy wife stirs up a storm in a happily married employee's life, the tumultuous winds drag all of them into an intense courtroom showdown.

title: Indrajeet
subTitle: Indrajeet, a retired police officer, sets out to take revenge on his ex-lover's brother and friends for murdering his adopted daughter and son-in-law.

title: Indrajeet
subTitle: Indrajeet, a retired police officer, sets out to take revenge on his ex-lover's brother and friends for murdering his adopted daughter and son-in-law.

title: Tirchhi Topiwale
subTitle: A young man faces relationship trials when the parents of the woman he loves decide to get her married off to another suitor.

title: Dil Aashna Hai
subTitle: Laila, a cabaret dancer who grew up in a brothel, gets a call from her dying mother divulging that she was adopted. So, she takes the help of her lover, Karan, in finding out who her real parents are.

title: Mere Sajna Saath Nibhana
subTitle: Kanhaiya, a poor street performer, falls in love with Chanchal, a wealthy woman. He convinces his mother to ask for her hand in marriage, but things take a turn when Chanchal's father insults her.

title: Dil Ka Kya Kasoor
subTitle: A rich girl, Shalini, falls in love with an orphan, Arun, after he performs the poems she wrote using a pen name. However, things take a tragic turn when Arun marries the principal's daughter, Meena.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Zafar's obsessive love for Salma leads to her separation from her son, Iqbal. Twenty years later, Iqbal strives to reunite with his mother.

title: Paap Ki Aandhi
subTitle: Dharma, a dangerous hoodlum, embarks on a quest for revenge after he gets arrested and learns that the chief witness behind the case is his sister's husband.

title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
subTitle: Raj and Priya, a married couple, hire Madhubala, a prostitute, as the surrogate mother of their child. Trouble brews when Madhubala falls in love with Raj and insists on keeping the child.

title: Apna Sapna Money Money
subTitle: Arjun and Shivani are in love, but Shivani's father will never let them marry each other. Later chaos ensues when Arjun enlists the help of his conman cousin, Kishan, to unite him with Shivani.
